blocks.content:
Welcome to the edit the default notification policy learning path. You'll configure the default policy's contact point so unmatched alerts route to the right destination.

Every Grafana instance has a default notification policy. It acts as the safety net: any alert that doesn't match a more specific child policy falls back here.

## Here's what to expect

When you complete this path, you'll be able to:

- Navigate to the Notification policies page
- Open the default policy for editing
- Set the contact point for unmatched alerts
- Save the updated default policy

## Before you begin

Before you start, ensure you have:

- A Grafana Cloud account. To create one, refer to [Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/signup/cloud/connect-account).
- At least one configured contact point (email, Slack, or PagerDuty)
- Editor or Admin role (required to edit notification policies)

## Troubleshooting

If you get stuck, we've got your back! Where appropriate, troubleshooting information is just a click away.
